text: This is smartpipe. Point it at a folder of invoices. Ask in English.
Structured rows come back, stamped with their source. Every run ends with a receipt.
It's not just text. PDFs, images, audio, and video are native inputs.
Split a call into five-minute segments. Ask what was promised.
Free verbs cut the pile first. The model only sees what survives.
Every call lands on the receipt. Reruns come from cache.
Embed a folder once. It runs locally, on your CPU.
Then search by meaning. No database.
One command turns a folder of case files into a knowledge graph.
Entities found on-device. Duplicates folded. Zero model calls.
One brew install away. Semantic pipes, for your terminal.
